senses.gloss: A she-camel that has given birth five times; her ears are slit, and she is exempt from exploitation—she is not denied access to pasture or water.

examples.text: مَا جَعَلَ اللَّٰهُ مِن بَحِيرَةٍ وَلَا سَائِبَةٍ وَلَا وَصِيلَةٍ وَلَا حَامٍ […]
examples.english: Allāh has not appointed [such innovations as] baḥīrah or sā’ibah or waṣīlah or ḥām.
